nasb.text: And the man who was standing among the myrtle trees answered and said, “These are those whom the Lord has sent to patrol the earth.”

esv.text: So the man who was standing among the myrtle trees answered, ‘These are they whom the Lord has sent to patrol the earth.’

cnv.text: 那站在番石榴樹中間的人回答：“這些就是耶和華所差遣在遍地巡邏的。”

ccb.text: 站在番石榴树林间的那位对我说：“这些是耶和华派来巡视大地的。”
